hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Pong"'
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude has finished working" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Pong"'
TOOL=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_name'); osascript -e "display notification \"Tool failed: $TOOL\" with title \"Claude Code Error\" sound name \"Pong\""
ERROR=$(cat | jq -r '.error_type // "unknown"'); osascript -e "display notification \"API Error: $ERROR\" with title \"Claude Code Failed\" sound name \"Pong\""

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); ctx=""; pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".context_window.remaining_percentage // empty"); if [ -n "$pct" ]; then if [ "$pct" -gt 50 ]; then c="32"; elif [ "$pct" -gt 25 ]; then c="33"; else c="31"; fi; ctx=$(printf "Context: \033[01;%sm%s%%\033[0m" "$c" "$pct"); fi; cost=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".cost.total_cost_usd // empty"); cs=""; if [ -n "$cost" ]; then cost=$(printf "%.2f" "$cost"); sep=""; [ -n "$ctx" ] && sep=" | "; cs=$(printf "%sCost: \033[01;33m$%s\033[0m" "$sep" "$cost"); fi; model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".model.display_name // .model.id // empty"); ms=""; if [ -n "$model" ]; then [ -n "$ctx$cs" ] && sep=" | " || sep=""; ms=$(printf "%sModel: \033[01;35m%s\033[0m" "$sep" "$model"); fi; printf "%b%b%b" "$ctx" "$cs" "$ms"
